nasb.text: Then the Gibeonites said to him, “We have no concern of silver or gold with Saul or his house, nor is it for us to put any man to death in Israel.” And he said, “I will do for you whatever you say.”

esv.text: The Gibeonites said to him, “It is not a matter of silver or gold between us and Saul or his house; neither is it for us to put any man to death in Israel.” And he said, “What do you say that I shall do for you?”

cnv.text: 基遍人回答大衛：“我們與掃羅和他家的事，都與金子銀子沒有關係；我們也不願以色列中有一個人被殺。”大衛問：“那麼，你們說，我當為你們作甚麼？”

ccb.text: 基遍人答道：“金银不能解决我们和扫罗一家人的问题，我们也不想处死任何以色列人。”大卫说：“你们要我怎么办？”
